message:
fix: Prevent race condition in batch compilation timeout

Previously, when zig build timed out or failed, we had two race conditions:
1. Killer thread called kill() on already-exited process → "unreachable code" panic
2. stdout/stderr were null after wait() → "attempt to use null value" panic

Changes:
- Use OutputBuffer struct with mutex to store reader results
- Thread functions now return void (required by std.Thread.spawn)
- Read stdout/stderr in background threads that write to shared buffers
- Double-check done flag before calling kill()
- Join reader threads after wait() completes to get buffered output

This fixes the macOS CI hangs that occurred when tests hit compilation errors.
